message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam participantBorderColor #888888
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #888888
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderStyle dashed
skinparam boxBackgroundColor #D8D8D8
skinparam boxBorderColor #888888

participant "tuple" as tuple <<database>>
actor "Upper\nlayer" as upper
box "IP Layer" #D8D8D8
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as ipv4layer <<database>>
participant "Routing\ntable" as routing <<database>>
end box
box "IPv4 Ineterface" #D8D8D8
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as ipv4if <<database>>
participant "ARP" as arp <<database>>
end box
actor "Lower\nlayer" as lower

note left of tuple
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

upper -> ipv4layer : IPdata

note over ipv4layer
Allocate
IPv4
header
end note

ipv4layer -> routing : dst=192.0.2.1
routing --> ipv4layer :

ipv4layer --> upper :

note left of upper
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

ipv4layer -> ipv4if :

ipv4if -> arp : gw=198.51.100.1

note over arp
enqueue
packet
end note

arp --> ipv4if : ARP request
ipv4if -> lower :

lower -> ipv4if : ARP response
ipv4if -> arp :

arp --> ipv4if : resolved\npackets

note over ipv4if
send as
send
thread
end note

ipv4if -> ipv4if :
ipv4if -> lower :

@enduml
